description: Verify that the hazard analysis are conducted.
Verify that the known hazards are identified.
Verify that the reasonably foreseeable hazards are identified.
Verify that the hazards using data, experience, reports are evaluated.
Verify that the hazards requiring preventive controls are determined.
Verify that the hazard analysis is written.
Verify that biological hazards are identified and evaluated.
Verify that chemical hazards are identified and evaluated.
Verify that physical hazards are identified and evaluated.
Verify that hazards that occur naturally are identified and documented.
Verify that unintentionally introduced is identified and evaluated.
Verify that intentionally introduced for economic gain is identified and evaluated.
Verify that the identified hazards are evaluated.
Verify that the severity and probability of hazard occurrence is assessed.
Verify that the environmental pathogens for ready-to-eat foods are evaluated.
Verify that the effects on safety of finished food is considered.
Verify that formulation of the food is identified and evaluated.
Verify that facility and equipment condition, function, design is identified and evaluated.
Verify that raw materials and other ingredients are identified and evaluated.
Verify that transportation practices are identified and evaluated.
Verify that manufacturing/processing procedures are identified and evaluated.
Verify that packaging and labeling activities are identified and evaluated.
Verify that storage and distribution is identified and evaluated.
Verify that intended or reasonably foreseeable use is identified and evaluated.
Verify that sanitation, including employee hygiene is identified and evaluated.
Verify that any other relevant factors (e.g., temporal/natural toxins) are identified and evaluated.
